projects.name: Salesforce Ticket Assigner
projects.description: Automated round-robin ticket assignment for Salesforce Risk Investigation queue. Google Sheets for availability/state, Slack notifications.
projects.impact: Medium — Eliminates manual assignment, fair workload distribution
projects.sopCoverage: ✅ Listed in AI Tooling sheet. Gumloop flow link tracked.
steps: Phase 2: Handle no available analysts fallback

projects.name: UAR Agent
projects.description: AI-powered UAR report generation for fraud investigations (ID Theft, True Party, Rogue Admin). Automates 30-60 min manual process with human-in-the-loop review and edit tracking. 17 PRs tracked.
projects.impact: High — Saves 30-60 min per UAR, standardizes quality, built-in feedback loop
projects.documentation: Tech spec complete, SOP written, 17 PRs tracked
projects.metrics: Time per UAR, manual edit count, approval rate, effectiveness score
projects.sopCoverage: ✅ 11 UAR templates. Desktop Guide exists. Experienced + Standard scorecards.

projects.name: Bank Email Agent
projects.description: Automates payment fraud verification from bank-flagged transactions. Ingests via JPM CSV or Gumloop email flow, orchestrates existing AI agents, produces Release/Hold/Cancel dispositions with human review. 24hr SLA.
projects.impact: Very High — 24hr bank SLA, reduces fraud losses, leverages existing agents
projects.blockers: Engineering review needed, Gumloop API contract, JPM data format
projects.documentation: First draft complete, pending engineering review
projects.metrics: Processing time (24hr SLA), accuracy, agreement rate, false positive rate
projects.sopCoverage: ✅ Desktop Guide, Scorecard, ACH Macros, Bank Email Tracker, Banking Contacts, Gumloop macro.
steps: Build Phase 1 MVP (Gumloop + TranslatorAgent + review queue)

projects.name: ATO Doc Sub Agent
projects.description: Documentation sub-agent: converts confirmed ATO data into 3 outputs — (1) Panda ATO Report (23 new SAR fields), (2) SAR narrative (auto ≥$2K), (3) ATOMs Slack blurb. V3 prompt blueprint complete.
projects.impact: Very High — Automates entire ATO case closure pipeline. SAR compliance critical.
projects.blockers: Pinkham implementing 23 new Panda fields + Submit button (started 1/15)
projects.dependencies: Panda ATO Report schema update, confirmed ATO trigger, SAR template
projects.documentation: 4-phase workback plan. V3 prompt. 23 fields defined. Canonical data model done.
projects.metrics: SAR quality (L&C review), data mapping accuracy, automation time
projects.sopCoverage: ✅ ATO Desktop Guide, ATO Scorecard, ATO UAR Template, LOI Templates, AML/EDD Referrals, SAR template.
steps: Pinkham: Complete 23 new Panda ATO Report fields + Submit button
Pinkham: Develop structured output prompt + SAR narrative prompt
Doris: Finalize ATOMs Slack blurb prompt
Integrate with Panda API (confirmed ATO trigger)
Integrate with Slack API (auto-post to ATOMs)
Test against 10 previously confirmed ATO cases
L&C compliance review of SAR output
Define human-in-the-loop protocol for SAR draft

projects.name: FI GPT
projects.description: FI team's AI knowledge base. Ingests ENTIRE SOP house (72+ docs): 18 templates, 11 macros, 15 desktop guides, 13 scorecards, 2 procedures, 6 quick links, 7 AI tooling entries.
projects.impact: Very High — Transforms 72+ SOPs into instant queryable assistant. Accelerates onboarding.
projects.blockers: Architecture decision needed (RAG pipeline, embeddings, hosting)
projects.dependencies: Entire SOP house (72+ documents across 7 sheets)
projects.documentation: No tech spec yet. SOP house fully catalogued.
projects.metrics: Query accuracy, analyst adoption, time saved, SOP coverage %
projects.sopCoverage: 🟣 USES ENTIRE SOP HOUSE: All 72+ documents across all 7 sheets.
steps: Define architecture (RAG vs fine-tuning vs prompt-stuffing)
Design SOP ingestion pipeline — index all 72+ docs
Create conversational interface (Panda / Slack bot / standalone)
Test retrieval accuracy across all 7 SOP categories
Plan update pipeline to keep KB in sync as SOPs change

projects.name: Risk Alert / USR Tracker for QC
projects.description: QC tracking system for Risk Alerts and USR agent decisions. Dashboard to monitor dispositions, agent accuracy, and QC compliance.
projects.impact: High — Critical for validating AI agent accuracy and QC standards
projects.dependencies: USR Agent (live), Investigations Agent, QC Procedure
projects.documentation: No tech spec. Related SOP infrastructure exists.
projects.metrics: QC pass rate, agent accuracy vs human, scorecard compliance
projects.sopCoverage: ✅ USR DG [WIP], Slack Channel Review DG + Scorecard, QC Procedure, all 13 Scorecards.
steps: Define scope: what Risk Alerts and USR metrics to track
Map to existing scorecard categories + QC procedure

projects.name: UAR QC Agent
projects.description: QC agent for UAR reports. Leverages edit tracking (uar_edit_histories) to automate QC checks against scorecard criteria.
projects.impact: Medium — Depends on UAR Agent being live first
projects.blockers: Requires UAR Agent live with edit data
projects.documentation: No tech spec. Builds on UAR Agent data.
projects.metrics: QC pass rate, common edit categories, quality trends
projects.sopCoverage: ✅ QC Procedure, UAR Scorecards (Standard + Experienced), 11 UAR templates, UAR DG + Reconciliation.
steps: Analyze edit tracking data to define QC criteria
Map scorecard rubric to automated checks

projects.name: Salesforce QC Agent
projects.description: QC agent for Salesforce ticket handling. Monitors resolution quality across all 13 investigation categories.
projects.impact: Medium — Improves ticket quality and compliance
projects.metrics: Ticket quality scores, compliance rate, resolution time
projects.sopCoverage: ✅ All 13 scorecards, QC Procedure, Investigations Procedure, all Desktop Guides.

projects.name: Legal Report Update
projects.description: Automation for updating legal reports. May relate to LOI documentation, BSA/compliance reporting, or L&C workflows.
projects.sopCoverage: 📝 Possibly: LOI Templates, LOI Scorecard, AML/EDD Referral templates, Referral report.
steps: Check if LOI/referral reporting is the target

sopData.name: AI Tooling
sopData.description: Bank Email Gumloop, SF Ticket Assigner, USR/ATO/Phishing agents, Symphony AI

rationale: SF Ticket Assigner is live ✅. UAR Agent is P0 — most developed (17 PRs, full SOP) with 30-60 min savings per report. Bank Email Agent is P1 due to 24hr bank SLA pressure. ATO Doc Sub Agent is P1 — Doris & Pinkham actively building 3-output doc pipeline. FI GPT is P2 — standalone knowledge base for all 72+ SOPs. Risk Alert/USR Tracker is P2 for agent accuracy validation. QC agents depend on parent tools being live. Legal Report Update needs scoping.
